description:
Reentrancy in CommitStakeV2.challenge(uint256) (src/CommitStakeV2.sol#456-476):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- _safeTransferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),c.challengeBond) (src/CommitStakeV2.sol#466)
		- (ok,data) = address(usdc).call(abi.encodeWithSelector(IERC20.transferFrom.selector,from,to,amount)) (src/CommitStakeV2.sol#774-775)
	Balance read before the call:
	- balBefore = usdc.balanceOf(address(this)) (src/CommitStakeV2.sol#465)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- require(bool,string)(received > 0,NO_FUNDS) (src/CommitStakeV2.sol#468)
		- stale variable `received`

		- streamPay.cancel(sid) (src/CommitStakeV2.sol#719)
